contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 50
- Description: DApp event alignment audit + roadmap; QR-sales doc corrections
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/554
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/552
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/122
  
  Details:
  Corrected the misleading '[INVENTORY MOVEMENT] depletion' wording across OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS + WORKSPACE_CONTEXT (#552) and the bulk_qr_sales_template (dao_protocol#122) — INVENTORY MOVEMENT transfers custody person-to-person; the [SALES EVENT] alone is sufficient (downstream auto-depletes). Then audited all ~30 DApp event types (parallel mapping of DApp pages, dao_client CLI modules, and Sophia's autopilot handling) and checked the live Edgar events-catalog. Key finding: the catalog is already complete (30 events w/ required_fields + canonical_labels), so the gaps are in CONSUMPTION not definitions — G1 catalog loads 120s post-boot, G2 merge never updates required fields for hardcoded events, G3 per-event normalization covers ~4 events so ~26 silently drop LLM keys, G4 no intent->event disambiguation, G5 stale 9-of-30 fallback. Produced SOPHIA_DAPP_EVENT_ALIGNMENT_PLAN.md (#554): sequenced PR1-PR5 (one PR per turn), per-event UAT matrix, resume tracker w/ Advance markers.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 83.33
